channel.title: Product Architecture on Future Empowered
channel.description: Recent content in Product Architecture on Future Empowered

item.title: Embedding vs. Creating: The 5 Strategic Pillars of AI Deployment Architecture
item.description: Before committing capital to an AI initiative, executives must evaluate five core pillars to decide between embedding it into legacy workflows or launching a new product stream.

item.title: The Executive AI Deployment Matrix
item.description: A strategic 12-question scorecard to help technology leaders decide whether to integrate AI into legacy systems or launch a new product stream.
